title: 日本ダービーの後に・まだ蕾にて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The promised race, the Derby, is over. Sakura
Chiyono O has failed to win. The pain is keen as
she strikes the turf, devastated over her loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she hasn't lost sight of her goal of becoming
stronger and one day running with Maruzensky.
Sakura Chiyono O wipes away her tears and
stands back up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky watches her from the stands with a
satisfied smile, resolving to fulfill her final
promise with Sakura Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's growth and newfound
strength are thanks to her rivals. As she stands
there, hoping she can keep running forever...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan suddenly collapses. She's been
pushing her legs so far to the extreme, they give
out underneath her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is ready to leave the racing world
behind, but Sakura Chiyono O swears that as her
rival, she'll make Ardan regret leaving so much
she comes back.
